pages.speaker: Hypebeast Jake
pages.text: Yo, you're blocking my drip! Classic Dunk versus whatever you've got — let's go!

pages.speaker: Hypebeast Jake
pages.text: Nah nah nah... my Classic Dunks got slept on. I need to go re-up.

pages.speaker: Skater Kid Sam
pages.text: Hey! I've been skating Route 1 all day looking for someone to battle!

pages.speaker: Skater Kid Sam
pages.text: Whoa... my Grip Tape really got wrecked. Back to the skate park to train more!

pages.speaker: Tech Nerd Mia
pages.text: Initiating battle sequence. My Foam Cell's firmware is fully updated. Are you ready to be defeated?

pages.speaker: Tech Nerd Mia
pages.text: Error: unexpected loss detected. Running diagnostics... I need to upgrade my training protocol.
